title: Learning Transferable Visual Models From Natural Language Supervision
summary: Introduces CLIP, a contrastive pretraining approach that learns visual representations from paired image-text data and transfers effectively to downstream tasks in a zero-shot setting.

title: Scaling Up Visual and Vision-Language Representation Learning With Noisy Text Supervision
summary: Presents ALIGN, a dual-encoder trained on noisy web-scale image–alt-text pairs to learn aligned vision-language representations for zero-shot transfer.

title: Flamingo: a Visual Language Model for Few-Shot Learning
summary: Introduces Flamingo, a VLM that connects pretrained vision and language backbones and supports interleaved visual and textual inputs for few-shot learning.

title: CoCa: Contrastive Captioners are Image-Text Foundation Models
summary: Proposes CoCa, a unified image-text foundation model trained with both contrastive and captioning losses to combine CLIP-style and generative capabilities.

title: PaLI: A Jointly-Scaled Multilingual Language-Image Model
summary: Introduces PaLI, a jointly scaled multilingual vision-language model trained on large multilingual image-text corpora and evaluated across many multimodal tasks.

title: BLIP-2: Bootstrapping Language-Image Pre-training with Frozen Image Encoders and Large Language Models
summary: Presents BLIP-2, a two-stage approach that connects a frozen image encoder and a frozen LLM using a lightweight query transformer to reduce training cost.

title: Visual Instruction Tuning
summary: Introduces LLaVA, a multimodal assistant trained with GPT-4 generated visual instruction data to align a vision encoder with a language model.

title: MiniGPT-4: Enhancing Vision-Language Understanding with Advanced Large Language Models
summary: Aligns a frozen vision encoder with an advanced LLM (Vicuna) via a projection layer to enable detailed image description and instruction following.

title: Qwen-VL: A Versatile Vision-Language Model for Understanding, Localization, Text Reading, and Beyond
summary: Presents Qwen-VL and Qwen-VL-Chat, vision-language models with strong performance across captioning, VQA, and grounding tasks.

title: CogVLM: Visual Expert for Pretrained Language Models
summary: Introduces CogVLM, which adds a trainable visual expert module to a frozen LLM to enable deeper multimodal fusion and strong benchmark performance.

title: CogVLM2: Visual Language Models for Image and Video Understanding
summary: Introduces the CogVLM2 family for image and video understanding, improving vision-language fusion and supporting higher resolution inputs.

title: A Survey on Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Surveys multimodal large language models, covering architectures, training strategies, evaluation benchmarks, and open challenges for multimodal reasoning.

title: Qwen3-VL Technical Report
summary: Technical report for Qwen3-VL describing a vision-language model family with strong multimodal reasoning and long-context support.

title: Explainable Artificial Intelligence: A Comprehensive Review
summary: Comprehensive survey of explainable AI techniques, taxonomies, evaluation methods, and open challenges across ML systems.

title: Eight Years of AutoML: Categorisation, Review and Trends
summary: Systematic literature review of automated machine learning, proposing a taxonomy and analyzing trends, gaps, and future directions.

title: Causal Machine Learning: A Survey and Open Problems
summary: Survey of causal machine learning methods and open research directions.

title: A Survey on Self-supervised Learning: Algorithms, Applications, and Future Trends
summary: Survey of self-supervised learning algorithms, applications, and emerging trends.

title: Training Language Models to Follow Instructions with Human Feedback
summary: Introduces instruction-tuned language models using human feedback (InstructGPT).

title: LLaMA: Open and Efficient Foundation Language Models
summary: Introduces the LLaMA family of efficient foundation language models trained on public data.

title: GPT-4 Technical Report
summary: Technical report describing GPT-4, its training, capabilities, and evaluation.

title: Llama 2: Open Foundation and Fine-Tuned Chat Models
summary: Describes Llama 2 pretrained and fine-tuned chat models and their evaluation.

title: QLoRA: Efficient Finetuning of Quantized LLMs
summary: Introduces QLoRA for efficient fine-tuning of quantized large language models.

title: LoRA: Low-Rank Adaptation of Large Language Models
summary: Proposes low-rank adapters for parameter-efficient fine-tuning of large language models.

title: MLP-Mixer: An All-MLP Architecture for Vision
summary: Introduces MLP-Mixer, a neural network architecture based on MLP blocks.

title: Swin Transformer: Hierarchical Vision Transformer Using Shifted Windows
summary: Introduces the Swin Transformer architecture with shifted windows for hierarchical representation learning.

title: ConvNeXt: A ConvNet for the 2020s
summary: Modernized ConvNet design that revisits and improves convolutional neural networks with contemporary training practices.
